home.heroDesc: Increase participation, gather feedback, and connect with your audience - whether in-person, online, or hybrid - with an AI-powered intelligent Q&A platform.
home.joinDesc: Have a room code? Enter it below to join and participate in the session instantly.
home.joinHint: Ask the host for the room code to participate in the Q&A session
home.errorRoomNotFound: Room code does not exist or has expired.
home.errorGeneral: An error occurred, please try again.
home.featuresSubtitle: Choose from a wide range of interactive formats to suit your session content, format, and speaker style.
home.reviewsSubtitle: Trusted by thousands of event organizers worldwide
home.feedbackSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Help us improve hoi thao.

features.qaDesc: Collect and manage questions with AI auto-classification, group similar questions, and prioritize by engagement.
features.voiceDesc: AI automatically recognizes speech, distinguishes between audience questions and speaker answers in real-time.
features.uploadDesc: Upload presentation slides for AI to extract keywords, create sample questions, and improve voice recognition accuracy.
features.analyticsDesc: Track engagement levels, hot topics, and export detailed reports after each session.
features.aiModerationDesc: Intelligent question filtering and prioritization powered by advanced AI algorithms
features.realTimeSyncDesc: Instant updates across all devices with sub-second latency for seamless interaction
features.securityDesc: Bank-level encryption and SOC 2 compliance for your peace of mind
features.participantsDesc: Scale your sessions to thousands of attendees without any performance issues
features.voiceDesc: Allow attendees to submit questions via voice for enhanced accessibility
features.multilingualDesc: Real-time translation and support for 50+ languages worldwide
features.analyticsDesc: Comprehensive insights on engagement, popular topics, and audience metrics
features.recordingDesc: Automatic recording and transcription of all Q&A sessions for future reference
features.gamificationDesc: Engage your audience with points, badges, and leaderboards for participation

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your Q&A sessions and engage with your audience
dashboard.noSessionsHint: Create your first session to get started

voiceDemo.title: Voice Conference Guide
voiceDemo.subtitle: See how Voice AI works in conference sessions
voiceDemo.step1Desc: Create a new session, upload your presentation for AI to extract keywords and suggested questions
voiceDemo.step2Desc: Display QR code or share room code for attendees to join
voiceDemo.step3Desc: Turn on mic for AI to recognize speaker and audience voices in real-time
voiceDemo.step4Desc: AI classifies, groups similar questions, and auto-matches answers

uploadFeature.title: Upload Presentation
uploadFeature.description: AI will extract keywords from slides to improve voice recognition accuracy and create suggested questions for attendees.

voiceFeature.title: Voice Conference
voiceFeature.description: Automatically recognize speech, distinguish between speaker and audience. AI will match answers with corresponding questions.

join.aiModerated: Questions are moderated by AI before appearing
join.questionProcessing: Your question has been sent and is being processed...

session.noQuestionsHint: Try a different filter or share the room code
session.shareCode: Share this code with your audience
session.speaker: Speaker

voice.enableToSee: Enable AI Voice to see transcript
voice.audienceDesc: AI recognizes questions from attendees and auto-creates new questions on dashboard
voice.speakerDesc: AI recognizes answers and auto-matches with corresponding questions
voice.aiDesc: Auto-classify, group similar questions and mark as answered

classification.enableDesc: Show classification badges on questions to help attendees understand the nature of questions

createSession.title: Create New Session
createSession.subtitle: Configure before starting
createSession.voiceAIInfo: When Voice AI is enabled, the system will automatically recognize speaker and audience voices, classifying content as questions or answers.
createSession.uploadDesc: AI will extract keywords and create suggested questions from your slides
createSession.processingDesc: Extracting keywords and creating suggested questions...
createSession.keywordsHelp: These keywords will help Voice AI recognize more accurately
createSession.questionsHelp: These questions can be displayed for attendees to reference
createSession.moderateDesc: Balance between moderation and free expression
